items.title: From Skill Text to Skill Structure: The Scheduling-Structural-Logical Representation for Agent Skills

items.title: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni: Efficient and Open Multimodal Intelligence
items.abstract: We introduce Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, the latest model in the Nemotron multimodal series and the first to natively support audio inputs alongside text, images, and video. Nemotron 3 Nano Omni delivers co
